item.description:
рҹ“Ң Patreon а·„а¶»а·„а·Ҹ а¶…а¶ҙа·’а¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶‘а¶ҡа·Ҡа¶ҡ а¶‘а¶ҡа¶ӯа·”а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ - / nextwatch
рҹ“Ң а·Җа·ҷа¶¶а·Ҡ а¶…а¶©а·Җа·’а¶ә : https://nextwatch.lk
рҹ“Ң а¶ а·’а¶ӯа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶ҙа¶§а·’ а¶ұа·җа¶»а¶№а·“а¶ёа¶§ : https://flickoo.com
Welcome to NextWatch!
We are a passionate team committed to driving meaningful change in Sri Lanka by rethinking and reshaping our nation's value system through political transformation.
As engaged citizens, we have worked both on the ground and across social media to advocate for a better future. This podcast is our platform to share our ideas, spark conversations, and connect with the people of Sri Lanka.
Through NextWatch, we aim to: вң… Challenge the flaws in our value system. вң… Expose and question the wrongdoings in political and social structures. вң… Inspire critical thinking and action for a brighter tomorrow.
Join us as we explore new perspectives, share stories, and work together to build a stronger, more just Sri Lanka. LetвҖҷs be the change we wish to see!
Subscribe and be part of the movement.
#mahindarajapaksa #srilankanews #akd #srilan

item.title: The Rarest Kind of Brains on Earth
item.description:
Create a free professional website in minutes with @Odoo using my link: https://www.odoo.com/r/z9OU
Pre-order my new book, The Terrible Paradox of Self-Awareness (out March 10, 2026): https://www.amazon.com/Terrible-Paradox-Self-Awareness-Awareness-Beginning/dp/B0FCDCCNJR/ref=tmm_pap_swatch_0 Other retailers available here (listed under Paperback and eBook): https://publishing.andrewsmcmeel.com/book/the-terrible-paradox-of-self-awareness/
In this video, we explore the diverse ways people think. Do you think primarily with visuals? Some people can't at all. Do you think primarily with an inner voice? Some people can't. Not only is this diversity of thought deeply fascinating and somewhat unnerving, but it has real implications on how people live and who they become.
Check out all Pursuit of Wonder books here: https://www.amazon.com/stores/Robert-Pantano/author/B08DCRJ85C?ref=ap_rdr&store_ref=ap_rdr&isDramIntegrated=true&shoppingPortalEnabled=true (Also available to more international

item.title: Sean Carroll: EinsteinвҖҷs most radical thought
item.description:
Become a Big Think member to unlock expert classes, premium print issues, exclusive events and more: https://bigthink.com/membership/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=yt_desc вҖңThe messy reality of it is that all of these very smart people, including Isaac Newton, were talking to other people.вҖқ
Subscribe to Big Think on YouTube в–ә https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvQECJukTDE2i6aCoMnS-Vg?sub_confirmation=1 Watch Sean Carroll's Full Interview with Big Think в–ә https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_TBNJyztai0
Albert Einstein altered the way we think about reality itself, and we often think of him as the most important physicist. But even his breakthroughs were part of a larger, tangled conversation among scientists stretching from Aristotle to Maxwell to Minkowski.
Sean Carroll, physicist and philosopher at Johns Hopkins University, traces how the universe emerged not from solitary genius, but from centuries of dialogue, error, and correction.
0:00 Einstein вҖ” underrated? 1:
item.itunes:author: Big Think

item.title: Your brain wasn't built to hold this much information | Richard Cytowic
item.description:
Become a Big Think member to unlock expert classes, premium print issues, exclusive events and more: https://bigthink.com/membership/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=yt_desc
Subscribe to Big Think on YouTube в–ә https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvQECJukTDE2i6aCoMnS-Vg?sub_confirmation=1 Up next, The terrifying ways that social media is altering teenage brains | Clare Morell: Full Interview в–ә https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tk_Q4DyWY48
Your brain isnвҖҷt broken, but it may seem like that because of how the screen age overwhelms your biology.
Neurologist Richard Cytowic argues that attention is a finite energy budget, not a virtue, and modern life is engineered to exhaust it.
Read the video transcript в–ә https://bigthink.com/series/the-big-think-interview/screen-age-brains/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=youtube_description

item.title: Yikes.
item.description:
Early March of 2026 became a defining moment in world history. For the first time AI was used in a major military operation, but that's just the beginning of the story. What followed was a betrayal by OpenAI, a slippery slope to mass surveillance and serious questions over what powers a government should have. In this episode we explore the nexus between AI, war and mass surveillance.
Watch or listen to ColdFusion on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/1YEwCKoRz8fEDqheXB6UJ1

item.title: Andrew Huberman: Peptides, Sleep Tech, and the End of Obesity
item.description:
Daisy Wolf speaks with Dr. Andrew Huberman, professor of neurobiology and ophthalmology at Stanford University and host of the Huberman Lab podcast. They discuss how the pandemic sparked a consumer health revolution, the emerging peptide and GLP landscape, what the science actually says about focus drugs, and the neurotechnologies Huberman believes will let us write to our own biology within the next five years.
Timestamps: 0:00вҖ”Introduction 1:15вҖ”The Health Awakening, Explained 7:02вҖ”MAHA's Role in the Health Movement 13:05вҖ”GLP-1: Nearly One in Seven Americans 18:37вҖ”The Non-GLP Peptide Craze 25:16вҖ”Rogue Experiments and Low-Dose GLP 31:40вҖ”Real-Time Cortisol Sensing 44:39вҖ”The Pet Octopus and AI Communication
Resources: Follow Andrew Huberman on X: https://twitter.com/hubermanlab Follow Daisy on X https://twitter.com/daisydwolf
Stay Updated: If you enjoyed this episode, be sure to like, subscribe, and share with your friends!
Find a16z on X: https://twitter.com/a16z
Find a16z on Lin

item.title: AI Is A Massive Problem. Here's Why.
item.description:
AI is everywhere. It's a really big deal. And no one understands how it works -- really.
Follow our research at palisaderesearch.org
Massive thank you to Prof. Geoffrey Hinton for taking the time to talk to me about this, and leading the charge so well about the dangers of AI.

Welcome to NextWatch!
We are a passionate team committed to driving meaningful change in Sri Lanka by rethinking and reshaping our nation's value system through political transformation.
As engaged citizens, we have worked both on the ground and across social media to advocate for a better future. This podcast is our platform to share our ideas, spark conversations, and connect with the people of Sri Lanka.
Through NextWatch, we aim to: вң… Challenge the flaws in our value system. вң… Expose and question the wrongdoings in political and social structures. вң… Inspire critical thinking and action for a brighter tomorrow.
Join us as we explore new perspectives, share stories, and work together to build a stronger, more just Sri Lanka. LetвҖҷs be the change we wish to see!
Subscribe and be part of the movement.
